latin: Semper pecunia superest ad unam bananam. quot constat una banana, decem aureis? Lucilla numquam in taberna fuerat et pretia rerum ignorabat.

glossary.ignorabat: did not know, was ignorant of

questions.prompt: What does Lucille think a banana costs?
Why is she so out of touch with prices?
questions.target: She has never been to a store
choices: She has never been to a store

translation: There's always money left for one banana. How much does one banana cost, ten dollars? Lucille had never been to a store and was ignorant of the prices of things.
